**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Jiangsu Zhenshida New Energy Automobile Co., Ltd. presents a fascinating evolution from a 1990-established auto body and mold factory ('Yangzhou Zhenshida Mold Auto Body Co.') into a manufacturer of low-speed, non-road electric vehicles (LSVs). Located in Jiangdu District, Yangzhou, it actively operates with 85 insured employees (recovered from a severe data column shift), indicating a solid, labor-intensive manufacturing presence. Despite the ambitious 'New Energy Automobile' in its name, its explicit business scope heavily caveats this by stating 'excluding products managed by the automobile industry catalog'. This reveals its true identity: it does not manufacture highway-legal EV passenger cars. Instead, it specializes in the robust, lower-tier market of electric tricycles, industrial/factory utility carts, sightseeing vehicles, mobility scooters, and their associated body molds and sheet metal parts.
